visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand outdoors at night. The woman on the left wears a purple top and jeans, while the woman on the right wears a black off-shoulder top and a beige bucket hat. Large bright signage for Costco Wholesale is visible behind them. They gesture animatedly with their hands and point towards the camera while speaking with expressive facial features. (2) The camera follows the two women as they walk away from the camera on a paved sidewalk at night. They are heading toward the entrance of a building labeled "JC PARK" with glass doors. One woman waves her hand back toward the camera as they approach the lit entrance. (3) In a bright indoor retail setting, a hand points to various Oral-B dental products. Close-ups show a pack of 8 toothbrush heads and an electric toothbrush set. Price tags with discounted numbers are clearly displayed on the shelf next to the items. The shelves are filled with boxed inventory. (4) One of the women holds up a large black IRIS Ohyama air fryer oven box in an aisle filled with cardboard boxes of household appliances. She smiles and looks at the camera while presenting the item. The lighting is flat and bright, typical of a warehouse or retail store. (5) A sequence of close-up shots displays a variety of kitchen knives in their packaging. The knives have different finishes, including one with a colorful, iridescent titanium coating. The items are hanging on a metal rack within the retail space. (6) Further close-ups show various household goods such as Olay skin cream, Elixir serum, Shiseido lotion, Tide laundry pods, and Calvin Klein underwear packs. Each item has a promotional price tag attached. The background remains a blurry retail aisle. (7) The woman in the beige hat squats next to a "Ms. Pac-Man" arcade game machine on a shelf. She points at the machine and smiles at the camera. The surrounding area is packed with various toys and boxed goods in a warehouse-style shopping environment.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 你知道好市多. (2) [Variety]: 挖寶必來! 退貨的東西. [Subtitle]: 都跑去哪裡嗎. (3) [Subtitle]: 去哪裡. (4) [Subtitle]: 跟我來. (5) [Slogan]: 桃園 JC PARK全新開幕. (6) [Subtitle]: 歐樂b刷頭只要 1,096. (7) [Subtitle]: 歐樂b牙刷 6,500變4,300. (8) [Slogan]: 兩組 4,300. [Subtitle]: 這比好市多還要便宜很多. (9) [Slogan]: 1支 2,150元. [Subtitle]: 1支 2,150. (10) [Subtitle]: 我們超愛買的牙線 這邊只要. (11) [Subtitle]: 呃 原價466 這邊 280. (12) [Subtitle]: 但是他是 拆過的. (13) [Variety]: 拆過的. [Subtitle]: 他會告訴你裡面有幾個. (14) [Subtitle]: 但是都是新的 現場都可以檢查. (15) [Subtitle]: 舒特膚 平常 637 這邊兩罐 446. (16) [Subtitle]: 一罐只要 223. (17) [Subtitle]: 日本的氣炸烤箱 2,099. (18) [Variety]: 福利品. (19) [Subtitle]: 太划算了吧 而且很漂亮. (20) [Subtitle]: 這些日本廚具刀 都是半價. (21) [Subtitle]: 他上面是有特殊工藝 所以你看他是 有一點 電藍色. (22) [Subtitle]: 超美的 這個也是半價. (23) [Subtitle]: 超漂亮的 我的天啊. (24) [Subtitle]: 全罩安全帽 1,300. (25) [Subtitle]: 雖然包裝很醜 可是裡面還是全新的 959. (26) [Subtitle]: 超級無敵划算 因為他原價 1,800. (27) [Subtitle]: 這個在澳洲超有名的. (28) [Subtitle]: 資生堂乳液不用 1,000元. (29) [Subtitle]: Tide 洗衣球 半價. (30) [Subtitle]: CK內衣 一件只要 300塊. (31) [Subtitle]: 這個打折完 4,000多. (32) [Subtitle]: 有很多好挖寶的 可以來逛逛.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a purple short-sleeved top; the other has shoulder-length dark hair and wears a black top with a beige bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts on an urban sidewalk at night with the Costco logo and street traffic visible. It transitions to the interior of a JC Park retail outlet, which resembles a warehouse store with high ceilings, industrial shelving, and numerous cardboard shipping boxes stacked high.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy female voice speaks quickly with a bright, enthusiastic tone. In the background, an upbeat, mid-tempo electronic pop track plays with a steady, driving drum beat. The acoustic environment sounds like an open outdoor space with a slight ambient hum from distant traffic. (2) There is a sudden transition in the background texture as the voices move indoors. A faint metallic "click" sounds as if a door is being opened. The primary speaker's voice becomes slightly more resonant, reflecting an indoor retail space with flat, hard surfaces. The BGM continues with its consistent beat. (3) The female narrator's speech rate increases as she begins listing prices and product names. Periodic sharp "thud" and "rustle" sounds occur as items are handled or pointed to. The background music maintains its energetic presence without drowning out the clear, enunciated vocals. (4) A series of short, quick vocal interjections from a second female voice can be heard, responding with excitement. The sound of plastic packaging rustling is prominent as products are showcased. The overall mix remains clean with a high signal-to-noise ratio, focused on the narration. (5) The video concludes with the primary speaker delivering a summary in a friendly, inviting tone. A final percussive hit in the music coincides with the end of the sentence. The ambient noise floor is low, consisting only of very faint store chatter and the underlying hum of an HVAC system.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a retail outlet (JC Park) that sells Costco returned items at significantly discounted prices. It utilizes an energetic vlog style to highlight various high-value items and their price differences compared to original retail.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators specifically highlight the location 'JC PARK' in Taoyuan and demonstrate many products available there.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses rapid-fire editing and high-energy narration typical of social media shopping influencers. The focus is on price comparison and 'treasure hunting' appeal.
